descriptionKey.english: [annihilate] this card. Deal damage to your Pyre equal to [effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.power]% of its current health. Draw [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power] cards.
descriptionKey.french: Purgez cette carte. Infligez à votre Brasier des dégâts valant [effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.power] % de ses PV actuels. Piochez [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power] cartes.

descriptionKey.portuguese: Expurga esta carta. Causa dano à sua Pira igual a [effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.power]% da vida atual dela. Compra [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power] cartas.

descriptionKey.chinese_traditional: [annihilate]此卡。對你的薪火造成等同於其目前生命值[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.power]%的傷害。抽[effect0.upgrade.trait1.power]張牌。
descriptionKey.korean: 이 카드를 [annihilate]합니다. 현재 체력의 [effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.power]%만큼 화로에 피해를 줍니다. 카드를 [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power]장 뽑습니다.
descriptionKey.japanese: このカードを[annihilate]する。自軍の炉に現在の体力の[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.power]%分のダメージを与える。カードを[effect0.upgrade.trait1.power]枚ドローする。
